[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01110101 5
1 10100110 4
2 10100001 3
3 11101000 4
4 01101001 4
5 10101111 6
6 00101111 5
7 01100010 3

01 00000000 a
12 00101100 3
23 11111000 5
34 00111100 4
45 10000001 2
56 11101010 5
67 01111000 4
70 11111011 7

02 11010011 5
13 00101011 4
24 00111011 5
35 01000010 2
46 10010100 3
57 01101101 5
60 01111100 5
71 00000100 1

03 11010100 4
14 11101000 4 match 3
25 01000101 3
36 01010111 5
47 00010011 3
50 01101001 4 match 4
61 10000011 3
72 11010111 6

04 00010111 4
15 10010110 4
26 01010000 2
37 11010000 3
40 00010111 4
51 10010110 4
62 01010000 2
73 11010000 3

05 01101001 4 match 4

27 11010111 6
30 11010100 4
41 11101000 4 match 3

74 00010011 3

06 01111100 5

07 11111011 7
